releaseNotes: Fixed Movies/TV Shows sometimes never populating for an account even though Live TV worked fine - a single oddly-formatted category from the provider was silently canceling the entire Movies or TV Shows sync before anything got saved, with no visible error. Also includes the previous update: the player controls bar always comes back when you press OK, and the D-pad reliably moves between its buttons (rewind/FF, play, stop, captions, sleep timer, etc).
